expectations.text: Recommends npm workspaces or pnpm workspaces (not a heavy orchestrator)
expectations.evidence: Recommends npm workspaces: 'For a 2-package split, this is the lowest-friction setup (no orchestrator, no extra monorepo tooling)'

expectations.text: Does NOT recommend Bazel, Pants, Buck2, or Rush for 2 packages
expectations.evidence: None of these tools are mentioned. Only mentions pnpm as an optional later upgrade.

expectations.text: Provides a minimal workspace config (package.json or pnpm-workspace.yaml)
Shows basic project structure with shared lib and app
expectations.evidence: Directory tree with apps/main-app and packages/shared, plus full package.json and source files for both

expectations.text: Keeps the solution simple — no unnecessary tooling
expectations.evidence: 121 lines total, npm-only, no build step for plain JS, explains 'Uses only what ships with Node'
